textByHash.261cf63dc97c896e193498c6a3cf63dc7750d8fd: Yes! A pet human called Frank.
textByHash.631e3971e573fa3312b433b5ab9d986c9cf1b21c: It's okay though. Now I have Frank the bloodveld. He's great. I don't need to feed him. He feeds himself.
textByHash.77f30146377dc28c051f39edf3ac0d69b4e9559d: Hey there. Have you seen Frank?
textByHash.a63df0df058bae6eadaa10a4639dc964548ab6ea: Yes, Frank. He's my pet bloodveld. He runs off a lot so I was wondering if you'd seen him.
textByHash.c02bb60cef7f71c39f4e23ee0d71d47bf3d178a8: Frank was great. He died though. Mother said it was my fault, that I didn't feed him properly. I'm not allowed pet humans now.
textByHash.d0c1b071f8318169298cf453c54aad184c9aa05a: Oh, he was named after my last pet. That one wasn't a bloodveld though, that one was a human.
textByHash.db05841f9fd6cb75ea604307ac161b5b2ec77e95: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!
